summary: Iteration 123: Backend-only testing of 3 new features: (1) Preventivi row color coding via commessa_stato enrichment, (2) Generic commessa creation endpoint, (3) Planning drag-drop Kanban. All 11 tests passed (100%).

preventivi_commessa_enrichment.test: Returns commessa_stato, commessa_id, commessa_numero for linked preventivi
preventivi_commessa_enrichment.result: PASS - prev_35c6b96a9e75 correctly returns commessa_stato=chiuso, commessa_id=com_e8c4810ad476, commessa_numero=NF-2026-000001

preventivi_status_filter_enrichment.result: PASS - Returns 11 preventivi with correct enrichment

generic_commessa_creation.test: Creates commessa with generica=true and numero starting with GEN-
generic_commessa_creation.result: PASS - Created commessa with numero=GEN-PRV-2026-0039, generica=true

generic_commessa_in_board_view.test: Generic commessa appears in board with generica field
generic_commessa_in_board_view.result: PASS - Found generic commessa in preventivo column with generica=true

kanban_drag_drop_status.result: PASS - Status changed to lavorazione, generica field preserved

critical_code_review_comments: Backend preventivi list enrichment at line 369-380 correctly looks up linked commessa via moduli.preventivo_id OR linked_preventivo_id
Generic commessa endpoint at line 970-1040 correctly sets generica=true and numero=GEN-PRV-XXXX
Board view at line 299-316 returns all commessa fields including generica for Kanban UI
Frontend should use commessa_stato for row coloring: Accettato=amber (status but no commessa), In Lavorazione=blue, Chiuso=green
seed_data_creation: Test created 2 generic commesse during testing: (1) com_a418e85eb68a from prev_6534e128c9 during manual testing, (2) another from prev_867f3cda72 during pytest. Both have generica=true and GEN- prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 11 backend tests pass for iteration 123 features. Key data points: (1) prev_35c6b96a9e75 (PRV-2026-0033) is linked to com_e8c4810ad476 (stato=chiuso), (2) prev_6534e128c9 (PRV-2026-0045) now has a generic commessa com_a418e85eb68a with numero=GEN-PRV-2026-0045. The frontend color coding should use commessa_stato field from preventivi list API.
